tests.test_name: Download format extension matches selected format -- MD, shiftdoc-tca-story_sample.md
tests.feature: Story Coverage download — filename and format (mocked)
tests.description: Verifies that downloading coverage results in MD format produces a file with the correct name and extension based on the uploaded story file.

test_coverage.verification_step: Given a coverage result is displayed from an uploaded story file
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Coverage results are available from a named uploaded story file

test_coverage.verification_step: When I click the Download MD button
test_coverage.what_it_checks: User can trigger a download in Markdown format

test_coverage.verification_step: Then the downloaded file is named "shiftdoc-tca-story_sample.md"
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Downloaded file name reflects the original story filename and uses the .md extension

tests.test_name: Download filename falls back to date-time when story is pasted
tests.feature: Story Coverage download — filename and format (mocked)
tests.description: Verifies that when coverage results come from pasted story text (no file name available), the downloaded file is automatically named using a date-time timestamp instead.

test_coverage.verification_step: Given a coverage result is displayed
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Coverage results are available from pasted story text with no associated filename

test_coverage.verification_step: When I click the Download MD button
test_coverage.what_it_checks: User triggers a download in Markdown format
Downloaded file is automatically named with a date-time stamp when no story filename exists
